mapper.select: select cfgkey, value, comments from cotdl.tbl_piiconfig order by cfgkey
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piiconfig (cfgkey, value, comments) values (#{cfgkey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{value, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
insert into COTDL.tbl_piiconfig (cfgkey, value, comments) values (#{cfgkey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{value, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comments, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select cfgkey, value, comments from cotdl.tbl_piiconfig where cfgkey= #{cfgkey}

select cfgkey, value, comments from cotdl.tbl_piiconfig
order by cfgkey limit #{offset}, #{amount}
